blended.narrative: Afton Alps is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 21 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 45°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 16" of heavy snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 1.4" of snow, highs of 24°F, winds around 21 mph.
